title: critesion brevisubulatum subsp. nevskianum
intro: Critesion brevisubulatum subsp. nevskianum, also known as a subspecies of small-flowered bromes, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Critesion brevisubulatum subsp. nevskianum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and improve respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, this plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as in combination with other herbs to create medicinal remedies.
